# KinStay Massanutten

KinStay Massanutten is a 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom vacation rental house at Massanutten Resort in McGaheysville, VA, sleeping up to 10 guests. It features two living areas, a game room with shuffleboard and arcade cabinets, forest decks, and a Level 2 EV charger.

## Key Facts
- **Location:** McGaheysville, VA 22840 (Inside Massanutten Resort, backs up to George Washington National Forest)
- **Bedrooms:** 4 bedrooms
- **Bathrooms:** 3 bathrooms
- **Capacity:** Sleeps 10 guests
- **On-site Parking:** Driveway for 3-4 cars + Level 2 EV Charger
- **Booking Options:** Book direct on [kinstay.com](https://kinstay.com) (no service fees) or via [Airbnb](https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/40027295) and [VRBO](https://www.vrbo.com/1812457).

## Notable Amenities
- Keyless smart lock entry
- High-speed WiFi (suitable for remote work and streaming)
- Game room (9-foot shuffleboard, retro arcade machines, game table)
- Kids' playroom (toys, high chair, pack-n-play)
- Two indoor gas fireplaces (one on each living level)
- Fully equipped kitchen with a live-edge dining table seating 10
- Wraparound covered forest decks with gas grill and outdoor seating
- In-home washer & dryer

## Local Area & Distance
- **Inside Massanutten Resort:** Skiing, snow tubing, indoor/outdoor WaterPark, golf, zip lines, and Family Adventure Park are all within 5-10 minutes.
- **National Parks:** George Washington National Forest (backs up to the property); Shenandoah National Park & Skyline Drive (20-30 mins).
- **Caverns:** Luray Caverns (30 mins).
- **Harrisonburg:** Restaurants, breweries, and James Madison University (15-20 mins).

## FAQ Summary
- **Check-in/out:** Check-in after 4:00 PM; check-out by 10:00 AM (smart lock code provided).
- **Pet Policy:** Small pets welcome for a nightly fee (inquire before booking).
- **Driveway:** Narrow and steep; 4WD/AWD or snow tires recommended in winter conditions.
